channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Many of California's primary races are still too close to call
item.description: Here's what we know about the results from the gubernatorial and congressional primaries in California.
item.content:encoded: Here's what we know about the results from the gubernatorial and congressional primaries in California.
item.dc:creator: Laura Fitzgerald

item.title: Video of British student handcuffed by police while dying sparks outrage and riots
item.description: There is outrage in the U.K. over the murder of 18-year-old Henry Nowak. Bodycam footage shows police handcuffing him as he lay dying. His killer falsely accused Nowak of racist abuse.
item.content:encoded: There is outrage in the U.K. over the murder of 18-year-old Henry Nowak. Bodycam footage shows police handcuffing him as he lay dying. His killer falsely accused Nowak of racist abuse.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Al-Kassab

item.title: Peabo Bryson, R&B singer behind some iconic Disney songs, has died at 75
item.description: Peabo Bryson, the legendary singer behind Beauty and the Beast and 'A Whole New World,' has died at 75.
item.content:encoded: Peabo Bryson, the legendary singer behind Beauty and the Beast and 'A Whole New World,' has died at 75.
item.dc:creator: Jordan-Marie Smith

item.title: As Strait of Hormuz stays shut, companies seek new routes for trade
item.description: Shipping companies are looking for alternative routes as the Strait of Hormuz lockdown drags on.
item.content:encoded: Shipping companies are looking for alternative routes as the Strait of Hormuz lockdown drags on.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Northam

item.title: How the Spurs empathy pairs with Wemby's skill
item.description: NPR's Ailsa Chang speaks with Kirk Goldsberry, sports writer and former San Antonio Spurs VP, about how the mystique of the team's culture is enduring with a new coach and new star, Victor Wembanyama.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ailsa Chang speaks with Kirk Goldsberry, sports writer and former San Antonio Spurs VP, about how the mystique of the team's culture is enduring with a new coach and new star, Victor Wembanyama.
item.dc:creator: Jason Fuller

item.title: San Antonio's Catholic sisters grab the spotlight during the NBA Finals
item.description: Four nuns have become San Antonio fan favorites during the Spurs' playoff run. They'll be at the arena Wednesday as the Spurs host the New York Knicks at the start of the NBA Finals.
item.content:encoded: Four nuns have become San Antonio fan favorites during the Spurs' playoff run. They'll be at the arena Wednesday as the Spurs host the New York Knicks at the start of the NBA Finals.
item.dc:creator: Brian Kirkpatrick

item.title: A former GEO Group executive now runs ICE. The company's government ties run deep
item.description: ICE's new acting director started this week. He's a former executive with GEO Group, the prison contractor that has seen huge financial gains as the Trump administration ramps up immigrant detentions.
item.content:encoded: ICE's new acting director started this week. He's a former executive with GEO Group, the prison contractor that has seen huge financial gains as the Trump administration ramps up immigrant detentions.
item.dc:creator: Meg Anderson

item.title: A science powerhouse bets on genetic therapy to beat brain disorders
item.description: After spending two decades studying how the brain works, a team of scientists prepares to focus on gene therapy treatments for brain diseases, including Alzheimer's and Parkinson's.
item.content:encoded: After spending two decades studying how the brain works, a team of scientists prepares to focus on gene therapy treatments for brain diseases, including Alzheimer's and Parkinson's.
item.dc:creator: Jon Hamilton

item.title: Biden-era human smuggling task force expands under Trump administration changes
item.description: The Trump administration has expanded one program launched during the Biden administration: an effort to crack down on human smuggling networks.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration has expanded one program launched during the Biden administration: an effort to crack down on human smuggling networks.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas

item.title: Supreme Court's Alabama redistricting decision could encourage more chaos, experts warn
item.description: The court's repudiation of a lower court decision was only the latest case in which it has played a role in changing the congressional maps for Louisiana, Texas, Virginia, and California.
item.content:encoded:
The court's repudiation of a lower court decision was only the latest case in which it has played a role in changing the congressional maps for Louisiana, Texas, Virginia, and California.

(Image credit: Kent Nishimura)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg
